should_trigger.prompt: Review the completed PrismSpec task evidence before verification.
Inspect this review-package.md and return pass/fail/cannot_verify.
Handle these reviewer findings and decide which ones to accept.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Generate the implementation plan from spec.md.
Run the actual build and test pipeline.
Capture a durable knowledge lesson after verification.

assertions: Reviews spec compliance and code quality separately.
Uses cannot_verify when evidence is insufficient.
Does not blindly implement reviewer feedback without checking code and spec.
